channel.title: Wireless Security on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Wireless Security on simeononsecurity

item.title: ESP32 WiFi Canary: Passive 2.4 GHz Threat Detection with RGB LED Alerts
item.category: "Network Security" , "WiFi Security" , "IoT Security" , "Security Research" , "Embedded Systems" , "Privacy Tools" , "ESP32 Projects" , "Hardware Security" , "Wireless Security" , "Open Source Security"
item.description: A detailed breakdown into the ESP32 WiFi Canary project - a compact, passive 2.4 GHz awareness sensor for the M5Stack Atom Lite that silently watches for evil-twin APs, deauthentication attacks, security downgrades, and beacon floods using a confidence-scored threat model and a single RGB LED.

item.title: Cisco CCNA (200-301): Security Fundamentals
item.category: "Cisco CCNA Course" , "Networking" , "Network Security" , "Access Control Lists" , "VPN" , "Layer 2 Security" , "Cisco Certification" , "Wireless Security" , "AAA" , "IT Networking"
item.description: Master security fundamentals for the Cisco CCNA 200-301 exam. Learn security concepts, device access control, VPNs, access control lists, Layer 2 security, AAA, and wireless security.

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1202): Security
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Security" , "Malware" , "Wireless Security" , "Windows Security" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Social Engineering" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security for the CompTIA A+ 220-1202 Core 2 exam. Learn physical and logical security, Windows security settings, wireless protocols, malware, social engineering, and hardening.

item.title: ISC2 CISSP: Communication and Network Security
item.category: "ISC2 CISSP Course" , "Network Security" , "Secure Architecture" , "Segmentation" , "Wireless Security" , "ISC2 Certification" , "Information Security" , "Zero Trust" , "SDN" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master Communication and Network Security for the ISC2 CISSP exam. Learn secure network architecture, segmentation, wireless and cellular networks, modern network concepts, and secure channels.

item.title: Network Plus Course: Wireless Security and IoT Access
item.category: "CompTIA Network Plus Certification Exam" , "Wireless Security" , "IoT Access" , "MAC Filtering" , "Antenna Placement" , "Power Levels" , "Client Isolation" , "Guest Network Isolation" , "Preshared Keys" , "EAP" , "Geofencing" , "Captive Portal" , "IoT Security" , "Wireless Networks" , "Cybersecurity" , "IT Certification" , "Networking Fundamentals" , "Information Technology" , "Online Learning" , "Professional Development"
item.description: Enhance your knowledge of wireless security and IoT access with this comprehensive Network+ course. Learn about MAC filtering, antenna placement, power level configuration, preshared keys, EAP, geofencing, and IoT device security.

item.title: Network Plus Course: Mastering Patch and Firmware Management for Enhanced Security
item.category: "Technology & Cybersecurity" , "IT Certification" , "Network Security" , "Software Updates" , "Firmware Management" , "Access Control Lists" , "Firewall Rules" , "Wireless Security" , "Best Practices" , "Government Regulations"
item.description: Master the art of Patch and Firmware Management with this comprehensive Network Plus course, ensuring enhanced network security and protection against cyber threats.

item.title: Mastering Penetration Testing: Advanced Techniques and Real-World Examples for Cybersecurity Professionals
item.category: "Cybersecurity" , "Penetration Testing" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Network Security" , "Web Application Security" , "Wireless Security" , "Social Engineering" , "Mobile Application Security" , "Cloud Security" , "Career Development"
item.description: Explore advanced techniques, tools, and real-world examples in mastering penetration testing to enhance your cybersecurity skills and career.
